title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Hits Bridges and a Port in Country’s South, Iranian Media says
summary_full: The U.S. military’s Central Command said the latest round of attacks had “hit dozens of Iranian military targets” but made no mention of civilian infrastructure.
summary_public: The U.S. military’s Central Command said the latest round of attacks had “hit dozens of Iranian military targets” but made no mention of civilian infrastructure.
